reading.title: Reading: My hobbies
reading.passage: I usually read books and listen to music in my free time. I love to travel, and I also like to play games. My sister likes to paint and watch TV. My brother hikes every weekend.

questions.question: The writer doesn't like to travel.
What does the sister like?
questions.explanation: "My sister likes to paint and watch TV."

reading.title: Reading: Review — A teacher's day
reading.passage: I always wake up at six in the morning. I am a teacher, and I teach English in the afternoon. I rarely watch TV at night. I usually read books instead, and on weekends I sometimes garden.

questions.question: The teacher teaches English in the morning.
The teacher often watches TV at night.
